stemHtml: Which of the following correctly compares the information received from D-ATIS and voice ATIS?

options.a: The D-ATIS includes forecast information such as TAFs.
options.b: Voice ATIS only will include pressure settings such as the QNH.
options.c: D-ATIS is updated continuously while ATIS is updated at regular intervals.
options.d: The encoded part of the ATIS is identical.
